name: every DORA rule in the pre-authored european-union namespace cites the authoritative eur-lex URL from the C-13 registry
command: grep -c 'docs_url: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2022/2554/oj' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/dora.yaml" | awk '$1 >= 3 { exit 0 } { exit 1 }' && echo dora-cites-eur-lex 1>&2
